overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character moving through a dark industrial warehouse facility. The scene features neon-lit corridors, parked vehicles, and the aftermath of combat with defeated enemies scattered on the ground. The atmosphere is tense and immersive with high-fidelity cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading bay with neon accent lighting

events.description: enemy character with cybernetic arm and skull tank top is defeated and falls out of frame
camera begins moving forward through the industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: engaging and defeating an enemy combatant before proceeding forward through the facility

notable_agents.action: enemy with glowing red cybernetic eyes and melee weapon collapsing after combat

entered.detail: exposed ceiling infrastructure with pipes and ventilation ducts
cool blue fluorescent tube lighting along the left wall
red emergency lighting casting glow on the right wall
futuristic blue coupe with illuminated rear lights parked ahead
large wooden shipping crates stacked against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close combat encounter against a cybernetically enhanced enemy in a narrow industrial corridor. After the enemy is defeated, the camera begins moving forward through the neon-lit space, passing blue and red accent lighting while approaching a parked blue sports car ahead.

events.description: camera passes the blue sports car on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor, navigating around parked vehicles

entered.detail: large corrugated metal shipping container with yellow roof trim
industrial waste container with yellow lid and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the industrial corridor, passing the blue sports car and revealing a large blue shipping container and yellow dumpster on the right. The environment maintains its dark, artificially lit atmosphere with exposed ceiling beams overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse storage area with scattered casualties

events.description: corridor opens into larger warehouse storage area with visible debris
passing defeated enemies lying on the warehouse floor

agents.ego_description: navigating through the open warehouse interior, observing the aftermath of recent combat

notable_agents.action: defeated enemy in dark clothing lying face down near storage containers

entered.detail: white and grey industrial storage bins stacked in tall piles
light yellow utility van with dark windows parked ahead
large equipment and tool chests along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a wider warehouse storage area filled with stacked plastic containers and industrial equipment. The camera moves past defeated enemies on the ground, approaching a yellow utility van parked in the center of the space under bright overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse loading dock with utility vehicle

events.description: camera circles around the right side of the yellow utility van
view temporarily blocked by the van body while moving around it

agents.ego_description: carefully moving around the parked van, checking the surrounding area for threats

notable_agents.action: defeated enemy in green shirt lying near the van rear wheels

entered.detail: tall red industrial gas tanks with white caps near the wall
tall storage racks loaded with cardboard boxes

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles around the yellow utility van, revealing red gas cylinders and metal shelving units along the right wall. The movement continues past the vehicle, showing more industrial storage areas and doorways leading deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a tense, narrow combat encounter into the expansive depths of a dark industrial warehouse. It begins in a tight corridor during a clash with a cybernetically enhanced enemy, moving forward through blue and red neon lighting toward a parked blue sports car. As the camera passes the vehicle, the space opens up to reveal a blue shipping container and a yellow dumpster beneath exposed ceiling beams. The scene then expands into a wider storage area filled with stacked plastic containers and defeated enemies, shifting toward bright overhead lighting as the camera approaches a yellow utility van. Finally, the movement circles the van to reveal red gas cylinders and metal shelving before gliding past the vehicle toward distant doorways leading deeper into the facility.
